final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (short-video vertical cover) for GGU, a gaming monitor brand, targeting esports consumers.

Style/medium: flat minimalist graphic design, high-end editorial poster aesthetic, bold typographic hierarchy
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout — headline anchored at upper third, product visual centered, subline at lower third; portrait orientation
Subject: esports gaming monitor with sleek bezel, screen glowing with vivid display, positioned as hero product
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background (near-black or dark navy), minimal geometric accent lines or subtle light streaks to suggest speed
Lighting/mood: dramatic edge lighting on monitor, cool blue or electric accent glow, high-contrast and tension-filled
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, electric blue or neon cyan as accent, white for headline text to maximize contrast
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as oversized headline; "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as subheadline
Constraints: headline must be the largest typographic element on the canvas, immediately eye-catching; text must be legible at thumbnail size; layout must respect 9:16 vertical safe zones
Avoid: cluttered background, gradients that muddy contrast, decorative flourishes, watermark, generic tech stock-photo look
